zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 145 of file zsh.c.

145                                                          {
146   if (!output) {
147     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
148   }
149 
150   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
151 #ifndef NDEBUG
152                   "#compdef _ascii_chat build/bin/ascii-chat ./build/bin/ascii-chat\n"
153 #endif
154                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
155                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
156                   "\n"
157                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
158                   "  # If first arg is a flag (starts with -), go straight to args completion\n"
159                   "  if [[ ${words[2]} == -* ]]; then\n"
160                   "    _ascii_chat_args\n"
161                   "    return\n"
162                   "  fi\n"
163                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
164                   "  _arguments \\\n"
165                   "    '1:mode:->mode' \\\n"
166                   "    '*::args:_ascii_chat_args'\n"
167                   "  case $state in\n"
168                   "    mode)\n"
169                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
170                   "      server_modes=(\n");
171 
172   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
173   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
174   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
175   if (mode_server_descs) {
176     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
177       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
178     }
179     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
180   }
181 
182   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
183                   "      client_modes=(\n");
184 
185   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
186   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
187   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
188   if (mode_client_descs) {
189     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
190       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
191       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
192         continue;
193       }
194       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
195     }
196     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
197   }
198 
199   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
200                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
201                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
202                   "      ;;\n"
203                   "  esac\n"
204                   "}\n"
205                   "\n"
206                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
207                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
208                   "    # Server-like modes\n"
209                   "    server)\n"
210                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
211                   "      ;;\n"
212                   "    discovery-service)\n"
213                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
214                   "      ;;\n"
215                   "\n"
216                   "    # Client-like modes\n"
217                   "    client)\n"
218                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
219                   "      ;;\n"
220                   "    mirror)\n"
221                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
222                   "      ;;\n"
223                   "\n"
224                   "    *)\n"
225                   "      # Default mode (discovery)\n"
226                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
227                   "      ;;\n"
228                   "  esac\n"
229                   "}\n"
230                   "\n"
231                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
232                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
233 
234   /* Server options - grouped by category */
235   size_t server_count = 0;
236   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
237 
238   if (server_opts) {
239     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
240     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
241   }
242 
243   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
244                   "}\n"
245                   "\n"
246                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
247 
248   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
249   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
250   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
251       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
252 
253   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
254     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
255     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
256   }
257 
258   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
259                   "}\n"
260                   "\n"
261                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
262                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
263 
264   /* Client options - grouped by category */
265   size_t client_count = 0;
266   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
267 
268   if (client_opts) {
269     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
270     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
271   }
272 
273   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
274                   "}\n"
275                   "\n"
276                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
277 
278   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
279   size_t mirror_count = 0;
280   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
281 
282   if (mirror_opts) {
283     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
284     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
285   }
286 
287   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
288                   "}\n"
289                   "\n"
290                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
291                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
292 
293   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
294   size_t discovery_count = 0;
295   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
296 
297   if (discovery_opts) {
298     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
299     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
300   }
301 
302   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
303   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
304                   "}\n"
305                   "\n"
306                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
307 
308   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
309 }




References get_modes_by_group(), and
    options_registry_get_for_display().


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().
